---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or data layer
title: "feat: <one-line summary>"
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## What is the feature

<!-- One paragraph. What should the viewer be able to do that it can't today? -->

## Who is it for

<!-- Stargazer? Educator? Astro researcher? Be specific — "everyone" is rarely true. -->

## Why now

<!-- Is there a data release, an event, an upstream API that's newly available? -->

## Sketch of the implementation

<!--
Optional but encouraged. New data layers should specify:
  - Upstream data source + license (must be MIT-compatible)
  - Approximate catalog size
  - Which viewer mode(s) it lives in (sky / solar / galactic / universe)
  - Whether it needs a bake script or streams live
-->

## Is this small or RFC-sized?

<!--
See GOVERNANCE.md. If it's anything bigger than "small" (new federation
module, new mode, schema change), please file an RFC at RFC/0000-template.md
copied into a new RFC/NNNN-<slug>.md file rather than this template.
-->

- [ ] I've read [`GOVERNANCE.md`](../../GOVERNANCE.md) and this is small enough for a plain feature request.
- [ ] If accepted, I'm willing to send the PR.
